recommendations.title: Hours
recommendations.overview: A father struggles to keep his infant daughter alive in the wake of Hurricane Katrina.

recommendations.title: Home for Rent
recommendations.overview: When her good tenants go bad, a landlord finds herself terrorized by a cult that seemingly has her husband enthralled — and her daughter in its sights.

recommendations.title: Badla
recommendations.overview: A dynamic young entrepreneur finds herself locked in a hotel room with the corpse of her dead lover. She hires a prestigious lawyer to defend her and they work together to figure out what actually happened.

recommendations.title: The Tale
recommendations.overview: An investigation into one woman’s memory as she‘s forced to re-examine her first sexual relationship and the stories we tell ourselves in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: A man wakes in a hospital with no memory, and quickly finds himself on the run in a locked down hospital with the Cartel on his tail.

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Nancy, Quentin, Kris, Jesse and Dean are all neighborhood friends who begin having the same dream of a horribly disfigured man who wears a tattered sweater and a glove made of knives. The man terrorizes them in their dreams, and the only es

recommendations.title: Angel of Mine
recommendations.overview: A woman grieving over the death of her daughter loses grip of reality when she begins to think her girl may still be alive.

recommendations.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
recommendations.overview: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a puzzling cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.
